title: Animal adventure: part 2
text: One day the little fox got lost. He was scared. He looked for his friends. He called and called. Then he saw a tree he knew. He ran home and found his family!

character_tips.anna: Stories have problems and solutions. Picture each part.
character_tips.maxim: Narrative arc in practice. Story-typing trains both skills.
character_tips.knopych: 📚 PLOT TWIST! Fox gets lost — and FOUND!
character_tips.klavochka: Such a happy ending, my dear 💖
